problem: What is the smallest integer $n$, greater than $1$, such that $n^{-1}\pmod{1050}$ is defined?

classified_questions.question: Can you explain what it means for an integer to have an inverse $\pmod{1050}$?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: According to the given information, what is the condition that an integer must satisfy in order to have an inverse $\pmod{1050}$?

classified_questions.question: How can we determine whether an integer is relatively prime to $1050$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you provide a list of the integers from $2$ to $10$ that do not have an inverse $\pmod{1050}$? Why don't they have an inverse?
classified_questions.label: b
